rows.label: qev060102_MSG0001
rows.name:
Shiraton-kun is late... I want him to
process this as soon as possible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060102_JNK0010
rows.name: Inform

rows.label: qev060102_SEL0011
rows.name:
Say that you came to pick
it up instead of Shiraton.

rows.label: qev060102_JNK0020
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev060102_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask what on earth he's
planning to hand over.

rows.label: qev060102_MSG0002
rows.name:
Well, it's obviously a highly toxic
research sample, isn't it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060102_MSG0003
rows.name: ...Whoa!! Who in the world are you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060102_MSG0004
rows.name:
...What, Shiraton-kun asked
you to collect the Voltant?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060102_MSG0005
rows.name:
I see, I see! That's a huge help! The
cold storage facility is overflowing
with dangerously analyzed samples.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060102_MSG0006
rows.name:
I've been wanting to process them quickly.
Here, take this capsule with you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060102_MSG0007
rows.name:
...But can they really purify such
hazardous materials in an instant?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060102_MSG0008
rows.name:
Even the Ma-non with their
hyper-technology can't pull
off something like that...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060102_JNK0030
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev060102_SEL0031
rows.name:
Vouch for them, saying they
will be perfectly fine.

rows.label: qev060102_JNK0040
rows.name: Doubt

rows.label: qev060102_SEL0041
rows.name:
Mumble your words, saying
you can't be entirely sure.

rows.label: qev060102_MSG0009
rows.name:
Do they really possess such an
incredible ability...? I'd like
to see that for myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060102_MSG0010
rows.name:
I see... Then I definitely need
to see it with my own eyes and
confirm if there are any issues...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060102_MSG0011
rows.name:
Alright, once I finish up my work here, I'll
pay Shiraton-kun a direct visit and see this
"revoltant" process with my own eyes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060102_MSG0012
rows.name:
He is currently... by ROSE・MOSS,
right? I'll go pay him a visit later.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060102_MSG0013
rows.name:
I primarily research Mira's pathogens
and highly toxic substances.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060102_MSG0014
rows.name:
Because of that, once my research
concludes, I inevitably accumulate
a lot of hazardous materials[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060102_MSG0015
rows.name:
What they call Voltant. I've
been stockpiling it, and it
was becoming quite a problem.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060102_MSG0016
rows.name:
If their abilities are genuine, it might
even be useful for my research...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060102_MSG0017
rows.name:
I'll drop by ROSE・MOSS later and
ask Shiraton-kun for a demonstration
of that purification ability.[ST:wait ]
